lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real LLM-driven rework; scenarios drive the evaluator + SST-loader proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the tier/growth decision now flows through the expertise_classify batch scenario; TestBridgeExpertiseEvaluator_* prove the LLM-driven path (batch parse, routing, public-signal forwarding, internal-TopicID non-leak, ref correlation, empty-input short-circuit, error paths) with a scripted bridge; the SST loader tests prove fail-loud operational bounds; the former magic-number lock tests are removed.

scenarios.title: Expertise tier/growth judgment routes to the batched LLM scenario, parses the classifications, and never leaks internal ids
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: ClassifyExpertise routes IntentEnvelope{ScenarioID: expertise_classify}, forwards {data_days, topics:[{ref,topic_name,capture_count,source_diversity,depth_ratio,engagement,connection_density,recent_captures_30d,avg_monthly_captures}]}, omits TopicID (json:"-"), parses {classifications:[{ref,tier,growth,confidence}]}, and errors on nil runner / nil result / non-OK / empty final / bad JSON.

scenarios.title: Batch correlation contract: ref maps classifications to topics; empty input short-circuits
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Empty topic input returns (nil,nil) without invoking the runner; a populated batch echoes each input ref so the caller maps classifications to the right topic.

scenarios.title: Operational expertise bounds are fail-loud SST config
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Missing/empty INTELLIGENCE_EXPERTISE_* keys fail loud naming the var; out-of-range values (max_topics<=0, maturity_days<=0, blind_spot_* <=0) are rejected.
